title: Published documentation is out-of-date
body: I was in the process of filing a bug on the broken example in the published documentation, but the source file was correct! It does look like that [has been fixed](https://github.com/containers/podman-py/pull/405), but the production docs site appears to be claiming v4.9.0 is the "latest", so it looks like the site just hasn't been update in quite a while.

comments.body:
@zmc that's right!

@jwhonce do you have access to readthedocs?
The issue seems not resolved. The docs are currently out of date.
